mechanics.raw_text:
Medium range is be- tween one-third and two-thirds of the max- imum range, Long range is anything greater than medium range, up to the maximum range, Example: When a laser pistol is fired at a target 0 to 5 meters away, itis firing at point-blank range. Targets 5 to 16% meters away are at short range. Targets at 16% to 33% meters are ‘at medium range. Targets between 33% and 50 meters are at long range. When a character fires at medium range, reduce his skill number by 2. At long range, reduce it by 4.
